productDisplayName: Doodle Girl's Princess Lime Green Top
description: CompositionLime green, round neck top made of 100% cotton, with lightly puffed short sleeves, sequinned print on the chest and gathering at the hemline with light rufflesWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Transform your little darling into a princess with this crew neck top from doodle. The lightly puffed sleeves and chest print add an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a tiny skirt and colourful slippers to complete her princess look.
